name: GIGABYTE B760 GAMING X WIFI6E GEN5 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7600(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax - BT 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B760 GAMING X WIFI6E GEN5 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX LGA 1700 gaming motherboard with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for mainstream gaming PCs.
